plugins.name: clockify-mcp
plugins.description: [v0.7.1] Clockify time tracking — 6-month JWT TTL + always-warm Cloud Run + in-thread nudge on user prompt submission (no OS notifications) with active-time accounting (THINK/TYPE capped at 7 min, GENERATE always counted, counter resets to zero when an entry is filed) + topic-aware snooze (decline once and the model goes quiet until the conversation shifts to billable work) + daily calendar reconciliation + auto-evolving project mappings. Universal rules: quarter-hour-aligned starts, 15-min quantum, 2 h cap enforced in-script, never double-books the same customer.
